name: Mailjet Email Service Config
description: Configuration and output store for the setup-mailjet-service skill. Populate credentials, sender identity, branding, and campaign fields before running /setup-mailjet-service. The skill reads all inputs from this DataQube and writes template IDs back to populated_values on completion — so subsequent send scripts and skill re-runs pick them up automatically.

consumedBySkill.description: The skill reads all inputs from this DataQube at startup and writes MAILJET_TEMPLATE_* IDs back to populated_values after template creation.

contactUpload.description: Upload any crowdfunding or patronage contact list directly from your machine — no terminal scripts. Works for Kickstarter, Indiegogo, Patreon, newsletter exports, etc. CSV must have first_name, last_name, email columns (case-insensitive). JSON must be an array of contact objects. Pass cohort_id and campaign_id to namespace the records. Supports dry_run=true to preview counts before committing.
contactUpload.deduplication: Cross-references nakamoto_knyt_personas and existing ks_backers_staging records before insert

lifecycle.before_skill: Operator populates all required fields in populated_values (credentials via .env.local, all others here)
lifecycle.during_skill: Skill reads populated_values as its primary config source
lifecycle.after_skill: Skill writes MAILJET_TEMPLATE_{CAMPAIGN_ID}_{N} IDs back to populated_values — these are then ready for send scripts and Amplify env vars

credentials.description: Loaded from .env.local only — never stored in populated_values

MAILJET_API_KEY.description: Mailjet public API key — found in Mailjet account → API Keys

MAILJET_SECRET_KEY.description: Mailjet secret API key — found in Mailjet account → API Keys

MAILJET_FROM_NAME.description: Sender display name shown to recipients

MAILJET_FROM_EMAIL.description: Verified sender email — must be verified in Mailjet before sending

MAILJET_LOGO_PATH.description: Relative path to logo image (PNG preferred, JPG accepted). Resized to 560px max and embedded as base64. No CDN or external hosting required.

MAILJET_CAMPAIGN_ID.description: Short identifier for the campaign. Used to namespace template env var names: MAILJET_TEMPLATE_{CAMPAIGN_ID}_{N}

MAILJET_COPY_DOC.description: Path to the campaign copy markdown doc containing the full email sequence

template_ids.description: Written back automatically by the write_back_ids step of /setup-mailjet-service. Add these values to .env.local and Amplify env vars.
